title: Francium
description: Minecraft but with extra steps, very hard and frustrating!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e97763191b61d8d8ebd05225aa916da06872184.png)

Francium offers a very difficult experience and will give you nightmares, the mod is currently in beta - hence the short Description, but I'll try to explain as deeply as I can.

This mod now supports 1.21.1🎉🎉 (not 1.21.2-3)

**Before downloading the mod;
PLEASE USE THE MODPACK instead**, that will bring the full experience, now.. what is "the experience"?

You need this on Server and Client.

Francium offers a unique way of playing minecraft, it will make the prosses of getting sertain things, like the crafting table sagnifigantly harder to do. 

![Jei](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ee09229e7a3aa8f598e04f6ccc2555ed4d0a820.png) **This mod NEEDS JEI as some recipes DEPEND on JEI!**

Most items are turned to dust, and more in game, as well mental damage will be taken.
Get down to deepslate **fast**!! To get Tuff! And get Tughhoar (dust).
